name: Dr. Digit's Rebecca's Ground Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 24 oz Tomato sauce or add some Chopped tomatoes
1 Ovenproof casserole dish large enough to hold comfortably
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions and drain.
3. Lightly brown meat in butter; pour off excess fat.
4. Add salt, pepper, and garlic powder to the meat mixture.
5. Stir in tomato sauce and chopped tomatoes (if using).
6. Simmer over medium heat for a few minutes.
7. In a separate bowl, mix cottage cheese, sour cream, scallions, cabbage, and noodles.
8. Spread a layer of this mixture into the casserole dish.
9. Add a layer of tomato sauce and beef mixture on top.
10. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, starting with noodles.
11. Finish with a layer of meat mixture and sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top.
12. Cook for 30-45 minutes or until contents are hot and bubbly.
13. Serve hot.
This dish freezes well.
